title: Hariota rugulosa
taxonomy: Hariota rugulosa is classified in the plant family Polygonaceae. This classification places it in the order of Caryophyllales. The family Polygonaceae includes several species of buckwheat and knotweed. The classification of Hariota rugulosa is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the same family. Further study is needed to confirm the exact classification of Hariota rugulosa.
